SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-12-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-12-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF FELCIA PACIFICA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT THE NORMANDY IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY DAVID KIMMEL, PARTNER. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE OF THE CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
